allow: Bash("/c/Program Files/R/R-4.4.1/bin/Rscript.exe" -e 'library\(dplyr\); d <- vroom::vroom\(""data/cosmos_resp_infections/standard/weekly.csv.gz"", show_col_types=FALSE\); cat\(""Current age values:\\n""\); print\(sort\(unique\(d$age\)\)\); cat\(""\\nCurrent geography values \(first 30\):\\n""\); print\(head\(sort\(unique\(d$geography\)\), 30\)\); cat\(""\\nTotal unique geographies:"", length\(unique\(d$geography\)\), ""\\n""\); cat\(""Dimensions:"", nrow\(d\), ""x"", ncol\(d\), ""\\n""\); cat\(""Columns:"", paste\(names\(d\), collapse="", ""\), ""\\n""\)')

Bash("/c/Program Files/R/R-4.4.1/bin/Rscript.exe" -e 'library\(dplyr\); d <- vroom::vroom\(""C:/tmp/weekly_prev.csv.gz"", show_col_types=FALSE\); cat\(""Previous age values:\\n""\); print\(sort\(unique\(d$age\)\)\); cat\(""\\nPrevious geography values \(first 30\):\\n""\); print\(head\(sort\(unique\(d$geography\)\), 30\)\); cat\(""\\nTotal unique geographies:"", length\(unique\(d$geography\)\), ""\\n""\); cat\(""Dimensions:"", nrow\(d\), ""x"", ncol\(d\), ""\\n""\); cat\(""Columns:"", paste\(names\(d\), collapse="", ""\), ""\\n""\)')

Bash("/c/Program Files/R/R-4.4.1/bin/Rscript.exe" -e 'library\(dplyr\); cur <- vroom::vroom\(""data/cosmos_resp_infections/standard/weekly.csv.gz"", show_col_types=FALSE\); prev <- vroom::vroom\(""C:/tmp/weekly_prev.csv.gz"", show_col_types=FALSE\); cat\(""In previous but not current:\\n""\); print\(setdiff\(unique\(prev$geography\), unique\(cur$geography\)\)\); cat\(""\\nIn current but not previous:\\n""\); print\(setdiff\(unique\(cur$geography\), unique\(prev$geography\)\)\)')
